fact expired (NULL = current)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"created_at"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"INTEGER"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Record 8:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Example Triples"}]

a:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Temporal Validity"}]
b:["$","p",null,{"children":"Facts can expire or be superseded:"}]
c:["$","$L1a",null,{"code":"# Add a fact\nmem.add_fact(\n  subject=\"Project Alpha\",\n  predicate=\"has_deadline\",\n  object=\"2026-05-01\",\n  confidence=0.90,\n)\n\n# Update with new information (old fact auto-expires)\nmem.add_fact(\n  subject=\"Project Alpha\",\n  predicate=\"has_deadline\",\n  object=\"2026-05-15\",\n  confidence=0.95,\n)\n\n# Query current facts only\nfacts = mem.query_facts(\n  subject=\"Project Alpha\",\n  current_only=True,\n)\n","language":"python"}]
d:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Graph Queries"}]
e:["$","$L1a",null,{"code":"# Direct lookup\nfacts = mem.query_facts(subject=\"Alice\")\n\n# Relationship traversal\nrelated = mem.traverse(subject=\"Alice\", depth=2)\n\n# Pattern matching\nmatches = mem.query_facts(\n  predicate=\"reports_to\",\n  object=\"Carol\",\n)\n","language":"python"}]
f:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Extraction from Working Memory"}]
10:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne automatically extracts triples during consolidation:"}]
11:["$","$L1b",null,{"chart":"\nflowchart LR\n  WM[Working Memory Entry] -->|NLP extraction| T[Candidate Triples]\n  T -->|confidence > 0.7| SM[Semantic Memory]\n  T -->|confidence < 0.7| DISCARD[Discard]\n"}]
12:["$","p",null,{"children":"Extraction uses a lightweight local model (no API calls) and runs during sleep cycles."}]
13:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L1c",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Schema Flexibility"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Semantic Memory has no predefined ontology. Predicates are free-form strings. This allows dynamic knowledge domains without schema migrations."}]}]]}]]}]}]
